rationale: The cited paper is not only listed as general background; it is explicitly used in the citing paper's construct development and empirical setup. In the measures section, the authors state that their key dependent variable (PPC specificity) is developed by drawing on prior constructs including Ghosh and John (2005), giving the citation a direct methodological role. The paper also uses this citation in framing prior OEM-supplier governance research and positioning its contribution relative to that stream. This is a meaningful use beyond a passing mention, even though it is one source among several.
relation_description: The citing paper applies ideas and operationalization cues from Ghosh and John (2005) to model and measure contract specificity in a new context: monitoring technologies in multicomponent industrial systems. It leverages that prior governance-fit literature as part of its conceptual positioning rather than directly testing the cited paper's specific model.
